title: The Python Tutorial — Official Documentation
description: The official Python tutorial. Start here for the most authoritative introduction to Python. Covers everything from installation to advanced topics.

title: Python for Beginners — Real Python
description: Real Python's beginner-friendly tutorials with practical examples and clear explanations. Great companion material alongside this course.

title: Python.org — Beginner's Guide
description: Python's official getting-started guide. Includes links to download Python, tutorials, and books for beginners.

title: Online Python REPL (Programiz)
description: Run Python code in your browser without installing anything. Useful for quick experiments when you are away from your development environment.

title: PEP 8 — Style Guide for Python Code
description: The official style guide for Python code. Following PEP 8 makes your code consistent and readable — a hallmark of professional Python developers.

title: The Zen of Python (PEP 20)
description: The 19 guiding principles of Python's design. Understanding these principles helps you write Pythonic code that fits the language's philosophy.

title: Python Discord Community
description: Join over 500,000 Python developers on Discord. Great place to ask questions, share projects, and learn from the community.
